SEARCH

Class Customer

java.lang.Object
Customer
public class Customer extends Object
Project: Lab3 - Customer Database Operations Purpose Details: Defines Customer entity for retail shopping store Course: IST 411 Author: Edward Saldivar Date Developed: 2/27/26 Last Date Changed: 3/1/26

  • Constructor Details

    • Customer

      public Customer()
      Default constructor for Customer class.

    • Customer

      public Customer(int customerId, String firstName, String lastName, int age, String email, String address, int loyaltyPoints, String newsletterSubscribed, String gender)
      Parameterized constructor for Customer class.
      Parameters:
      customerId - The unique identifier for the customer.
      firstName - The first name of the customer.
      lastName - The last name of the customer.
      age - The age of the customer.
      email - The email address of the customer.
      address - The street address of the customer.
      loyaltyPoints - The loyalty points accumulated by the customer.
      newsletterSubscribed - Newsletter subscription status.
      gender - The gender of the customer.
